title: Outline Pulse Rail
prompt:
Create a production-ready Outline Pulse Rail using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original compact scroll-style pattern represents reading position without depending on page scroll: three chapter buttons—Context, Evidence, Outcome—move a coral pulse along a vertical outline rail and update a short chapter summary. It should be usable inside both a compact card and a large detail preview. Use white and #F4F5F6 Bento surfaces, #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, gentle neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Coral is the only bright accent, and the card must not use gradients.

Use a labelled navigation landmark with native buttons, aria-current for the active chapter, a polite live region, 44px targets, and visible 3px keyboard focus. Support click, Enter, and Space. Move the pulse with a spring at stiffness 330 and damping 26, fade the chapter text in 150ms ease-out, and avoid actual global scroll listeners so the component remains safe in embedded previews. Keep all state local and deterministic with no timers, random values, storage, remote assets, or network requests.

At 320px, retain a readable single-column rail; on larger previews, preserve airy surrounding space. Maintain logical tab order, AA contrast, and explicit chapter text so the coral pulse is not the only cue. In prefers-reduced-motion mode, update the selected chapter immediately with only a 120ms fade. Return complete client code, a pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <nav class="outline-pulse"><button aria-current="step">Context</button></nav> */
.outline-pulse{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-left:2px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.outline-pulse button{display:block;min-height:44px;width:100%;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;color:#111;text-align:left;font-weight:800}.outline-pulse button[aria-current=step]{border-left:4px solid #fb6a4a}.outline-pulse button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.outline-pulse *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
